changes.value: frosted panel shell with opaque readable content regions
changes.reason: Apply glassmorphism surface treatment without weakening dialog content readability.

changes.value: subtle light border with sufficient edge contrast
changes.reason: Translate glassmorphism implementation hints into a component foundation rule.

changes.value: Use clear backdrop, dialog shell, and foreground content layers.
changes.reason: Expose prototype depth guidance without choosing a runtime implementation.

avoid: blur animation as the primary motion cue
rationale: Apply glassmorphism only to the dialog shell while preserving typography, button hierarchy, labels, and dialog structure.

source.description: Example patch generated from a component-scoped glassmorphism style application.
